metadata.name: Bolt Library
metadata.description: ISO metric M3-M64 hex (ISO 4017) and socket head cap (ISO 4762) bolt master geometry. Extended in Faz 2.4.1B with ISO 4014/4162, DIN 931/933/912, EN 14399-3, and stud/set-screw/shoulder/reduced-shank/fine-thread families.
metadata.primary_source: ISO 4017 / ISO 4762 product-dimension standards for head geometry (NOT ISO 724, which supplies only the inherited thread sub-fields). See per-record metadata.verified_fields / estimated_fields.

records.notes: Width-across-flats (head_across_flats_mm) is the standard ISO 4017 table value (verified). All other dimensional fields (head_height_mm, socket_size_mm, washer_face_diameter_mm, bearing_diameter_mm, recommended_hole_mm, clearance_hole_medium_mm, tap_drill_mm, thread_engagement_mm, weight_kg_per_100) are ratio-estimated, NOT read from the ISO 4017 dimensional table -- treat as reference_only and verify against the full standard (and ISO 273 for clearance holes) before production use. Thread sub-fields (pitch/minor/pitch diameter/stress area) are ISO 724, inherited from Thread Library, and are validated-grade on their own.

Width-across-flats (head_across_flats_mm) is the standard ISO 4762 table value (verified). All other dimensional fields (head_height_mm, socket_size_mm, washer_face_diameter_mm, bearing_diameter_mm, recommended_hole_mm, clearance_hole_medium_mm, tap_drill_mm, thread_engagement_mm, weight_kg_per_100) are ratio-estimated, NOT read from the ISO 4762 dimensional table -- treat as reference_only and verify against the full standard (and ISO 273 for clearance holes) before production use. Thread sub-fields (pitch/minor/pitch diameter/stress area) are ISO 724, inherited from Thread Library, and are validated-grade on their own.

Thread sub-fields are ISO 724, inherited from Thread Library.

Flange bolt per ISO 4162 (indicative only). All dimensional fields are ratio-based engineering estimates, NOT read from a ISO 4162 dimension table -- verify against the full standard before production use. Flange diameter estimated as ~1.9x the equivalent hex across-flats.

Stud bolt per ISO 898-1 (indicative only). All dimensional fields are ratio-based engineering estimates, NOT read from a ISO 898-1 dimension table -- verify against the full standard before production use. Double-end stud; length pair is representative only.

Set screw per ISO 4026 (indicative only). All dimensional fields are ratio-based engineering estimates, NOT read from a ISO 4026 dimension table -- verify against the full standard before production use. Flat-point hex socket set screw; no head geometry (headless).

Shoulder bolt per ISO 7379 (indicative only). All dimensional fields are ratio-based engineering estimates, NOT read from a ISO 7379 dimension table -- verify against the full standard before production use. Shoulder (precision) diameter is larger than the thread nominal diameter per ISO 7379 -- stored in metadata.

Reduced shank bolt per DIN 7968 (indicative only). All dimensional fields are ratio-based engineering estimates, NOT read from a DIN 7968 dimension table -- verify against the full standard before production use. reduced_shank_diameter_mm approximated as the ISO 724 pitch diameter (fitted-bolt convention).
